name: ASMR Toy
short_description: Create ASMR interactive audio mixes from a big library of satisfying sound clips, or use your own custom clips. Choose among several reverberation presets for more tingles. Load a mix and leave ASMR Toy playing in the background while you go about your day and relax.
detailed_description:
Create ASMR interactive audio mixes from a big library of satisfying sound clips, or use your own custom clips. Choose among several reverberation presets for more tingles. Load a mix and leave ASMR Toy playing in the background while you go about your day and relax.

What is ASMR?

An autonomous sensory meridian response (ASMR) is a tingling sensation that usually begins on the scalp and moves down the back of the neck and upper spine. A pleasant form of paresthesia, it has been compared with auditory-tactile synesthesia and may overlap with frisson. ASMR is a subjective experience of "low-grade euphoria" characterized by "a combination of positive feelings and a distinct static-like tingling sensation on the skin". It is most commonly triggered by specific auditory stimuli, and less commonly by intentional attention control.

supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Japanese*, Korean*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Russian*, Simplified Chinese*, Spanish - Spain*
*languages with full audio support
